unavailable.title: Workbook is not available yet
unavailable.description: The workbook builds on an existing matching report. Once both foundation profiles are complete and ready to evaluate, the workbook can derive its focus areas from them.
unavailable.introDescription: The workbook builds on an existing matching report. Once your match is fully ready, you can start working together here.

intro.title: Before you enter the workbook
intro.reportShows: Your report shows where you think similarly, where differences appear, and what you should clarify before getting started.
intro.rules: In the workbook, you turn that into concrete rules for how you work together.
intro.workTogether: You can work through it together or orient yourselves individually first.
intro.notEverything: You do not need to clarify everything at once.
intro.rightPoints: Clean thinking on the right points matters more than speed.
intro.savedState: Your progress is saved, so you can continue later.
intro.focusDescription: Start with the topics that matter most for you right now.
intro.advisorLater: If you want, you can bring in a third person later, such as an advisor or coach.

client.title: Workbook for your conversation
client.firstRuleSoon: Your first clear rule will take shape in the workbook.
client.existingWorkbookDescription: There is already a workbook for this invitation in the {context} context. The existing content was loaded so nothing appears lost. The next save will continue the workbook in the currently opened context.
client.summaryIntro: This is the working basis you currently agree on.

save.error: Saving is not working right now
save.previewDetail: This preview does not save input.
save.savingDetail: Your current state is being saved.
save.errorDetail: Please wait a moment. Your last saved state is still preserved.
save.loadedDetail: Your state is loaded and will stay saved automatically.
save.startDetail: Once you start writing, your state will be saved automatically.

advisor.activeTitle: {advisor} can now read along and add guidance
advisor.activeDescription: Both founders have approved access. The advisor can see the workbook and related report, but can only edit the designated advisor areas.
advisor.readyDescription: Access becomes active once the advisor uses the invitation link. Until then, the workspace remains unchanged.
advisor.waitingTitle: One approval is not enough yet
advisor.waitingDescription: The advisor remains blocked until {founder} also approves.
advisor.pausedTitle: The advisor is still linked, but currently has no access
advisor.pausedDescription: At least one approval is no longer active. The advisor can only work again once both founders approve again.
advisor.idleDescription: If you want to bring in a third perspective, grant access deliberately together. Until then, the advisor remains fully blocked.
advisor.accessDetails: Open only if needed: this shows the approval status and the frame for your role.
advisor.viewerScope: You only work in the approved workbook and report context. Founder contributions and approvals stay unchanged.
advisor.prepareMultiple: Prepare multiple advisors for this team
advisor.prepareDescription: Propose specific people, capture the second founder approval, and prepare a clean advisor context for each person.
advisor.emailRequired: Email is required. Your proposal stays visible even if the second approval is still missing.
advisor.permissionsTitle: What the advisor can do later
advisor.permissionReportWorkbook: See the approved report and workbook.
advisor.permissionReplies: Reply to visible founder contributions and add one impulse per section.
advisor.permissionNoFounderEdits: Does not change founder contributions, rules, or approvals.
